name: io.github.attestd-io/attestd-mcp
description: CVE checks, supply chain signals, live product catalog, and CVE detail lookup for MCP clients. Covers infrastructure, PyPI, and npm packages.

environmentVariables.name: ATTESTD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Attestd API key (atst_...). Required for check_package_vulnerability, check_batch_vulnerabilities, get_cve_details, and live list_covered_products. Get one at https://api.attestd.io/portal

environmentVariables.name: ATTESTD_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional API base URL override. Defaults to https://api.attestd.io
